title: Prepare to teach SC-300 Microsoft Identity and Access Administrator
summary: Learn about the Microsoft Learn for Educators program and how to best deliver its content to your students. Prepare to deliver Microsoft’s security solutions, SC-900 Microsoft Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals in academic program.

sections.title: Prepare to teach SC-300 Microsoft Identity and Access Administrator
sections.summary: Learn about the Microsoft Learn for Educators program and how to best deliver its content to your students. Prepare to deliver Microsoft’s security solutions, SC-900 Microsoft Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals in academic program.

lessons.title: Introduction to Microsoft Learn for Educators program
lessons.content_md:
The Microsoft Learn for Educators program provides eligible educators and faculty members at colleges, universities, community colleges, polytechnics, and some STEM-focused secondary schools access to Microsoft's ready-to-teach curriculum and teaching materials aligned to industry-recognized Microsoft Certifications. The Microsoft certifications enhance your students' credibility by giving them a professional advantage through globally recognized, industry-endorsed evidence of skills mastery.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-microsoft-learn-educators-program/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to Microsoft Learn for Educators program

lessons.title: Onboard to Microsoft Learn for Educators program
lessons.content_md:
Joining MSLE, getting certified in the content you'll be teaching, integrating Microsoft Official Course materials, and leveraging the various benefits will help ensure your students are well prepared for today’s job opportunities.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/onboard-microsoft-learn-educators-program/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Onboard to Microsoft Learn for Educators program

lessons.title: Microsoft Learn for Educators Course Preparation
lessons.content_md:
Your students want skills that make them employable. Using the resources available from Microsoft will help you feel confident to teach your students the skills they need to help them pass a Microsoft Certification exam.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/microsoft-learn-educators-course-preparation/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Microsoft Learn for Educators Course Preparation

lessons.title: Microsoft Learn for Educators course planning
lessons.content_md:
As you begin to prepare for your course delivery, begin by determining the curriculum integration approach. Once you have developed an implementation plan, you can set up your LMS to integrate with Microsoft Learn for benefits such as getting details about published Microsoft Learn content and student reporting. Set certification expectations with your students, provide clarity about certification, why, when, and how; this sets your students up for success. Finally, make sure to record your course in the MSLE portal to ensure you receive updates like resources like lab seats for your class, curriculum updates, and information about student events.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/microsoft-learn-educators-course-plan/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Microsoft Learn for Educators course planning

lessons.title: Get tips and tricks for teaching SC- 300: Microsoft Identity and Access Administrator
lessons.content_md:
Learn tips and tricks about preparing for your first teaching session, which labs to use, when and how to introduce technical topics, as well as other resources and materials.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/get-tips-tricks-teach-sc-300-identity-access-administrator/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Prepare to teach SC-300 Microsoft Identity and Access Administrator
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Prepare to teach SC-300 Microsoft Identity and Access Administrator**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
